allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd C:\\Users\\varna\\industry-newsletter\\backend; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd C:\\Users\\varna\\industry-newsletter\\frontend; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "Backend not yet ready: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Frontend: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend not yet ready: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "Killed PID $_" })
